name: Accra Central Data Center
description: The flagship Tier-III data center serving the Greater Accra region, providing colocation and edge compute for regional clients with N+1 power redundancy.

name: Kumasi Solar Plant
description: A utility-scale photovoltaic array supplying clean energy to the Kumasi metro grid and offsetting an estimated 4,000 tonnes of CO2 annually.

name: Takoradi Network Tower
description: Coastal telecommunications tower currently undergoing scheduled antenna upgrades to extend 5G coverage across the Takoradi harbour district.

name: Tamale Training Hub
description: A skills-development center running software engineering and cloud bootcamps for early-career talent in northern Ghana.

name: Kigali Innovation Hub
description: AmaliTech's East African innovation campus offering training, incubation space, and a graduate placement program.

name: Musanze Substation
description: Distribution substation temporarily decommissioned pending a transformer replacement scheduled for the next maintenance window.

name: Huye Water Facility
description: Municipal water treatment and pumping station serving the Huye district with real-time flow and quality telemetry.

name: Rubavu Warehouse
description: Lakeside logistics warehouse near Lake Kivu; loading docks are being resurfaced during a two-week maintenance closure.

name: Cape Coast Substation
description: Primary distribution substation feeding the Cape Coast township and university campus with automated fault isolation.

name: Tema Port Warehouse
description: Bonded warehouse adjacent to Tema port handling inbound equipment and spare parts for the national facility network.

name: Ho Regional Office
description: Regional administrative office currently closed for renovation; staff are operating remotely until the refit is complete.

name: Sunyani Network Tower
description: Inland relay tower providing backhaul connectivity between the Bono region and the national fibre backbone.

name: Koforidua Clinic
description: Community health facility with a connected records system and on-site diagnostics serving the Koforidua municipality.

name: Gitarama Solar Plant
description: Solar farm undergoing inverter firmware updates and panel cleaning to restore peak generation efficiency.

name: Nyagatare Data Center
description: Regional edge data center supporting low-latency services for eastern Rwanda with modular expansion capacity.
